info.title: Land Record Management System API
info.description: REST API for Nepal's Land Record Digitization System with Merkle Tree verification. Supports three user roles: Super Admin (Nepal Sarkar), Malpot Officer, and Citizen.

tags.name: Verification
tags.description: Merkle tree and hash chain verification

post.summary: Create a new land record (Officer only)
Bulk create new land records (Officer only)

post.description: Creates a new user with CITIZEN role. Returns JWT token on success.

400.description: Validation error or duplicate email/citizenship number

post.description: Get a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Revokes all refresh tokens for the authenticated user.
Validates credentials and returns a JWT token valid for 24 hours.

get.summary: Get the full current Merkle tree, level by level, for visualization
Get current Merkle tree root hash
Verify a single land record's integrity
Get Merkle proof path for a record
Verify the entire hash chain integrity
Get ownership history for a land record
List documents for a land record
Search for a buyer by exact credentials

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information. Requires valid JWT.
